---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

**The idea**
What you'd like to see. Be concrete if you can.

**Alternatives**
Anything you've tried or considered.

**Context**
Your use case (language, hardware, telephony, scale) — it helps us prioritize.

> Open-ended ideas and "would this fit?" questions are also very welcome in
> [Discussions](../../discussions).
